ddls:
CREATE TABLE "jsrs" (
  "jsr_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each JSR */,
  "jsr_number" TEXT /* JSR number (if applicable) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the JSR */,
  "evolved_by" TEXT /* Entity that evolved the JSR (e.g., UJSR for Java SE) */,
  "jsr_status" TEXT /* Status of the JSR (e.g., Draft, Final) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the JSR was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the JSR was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("jsr_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "modules" (
  "module_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each module */,
  "module_name" TEXT /* Name of the module (e.g., java.base, java.desktop) */,
  "loader" TEXT /* Loader type (e.g., boot) */,
  "upgrade" TEXT /* Upgrade status (e.g., No) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the module */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the module was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the module was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("module_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technologies" (
  "tech_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technology */,
  "tech_name" TEXT /* Name of the technology (e.g., Collections, Concurrency) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the technology */,
  "technology_type" TEXT /* Type of the technology (e.g., Language Feature, API) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the technology was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the technology was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tech_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "jsr_module" (
  "jsr_module_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each JSR-module relationship */,
  "jsr_id" INTEGER /* ID of the JSR */,
  "module_id" INTEGER /* ID of the module */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the relationship */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("jsr_module_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jsr_module_jsr_id FOREIGN KEY ("jsr_id") REFERENCES jsrs ("jsr_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jsr_module_module_id FOREIGN KEY ("module_id") REFERENCES modules ("module_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "module_technology" (
  "module_tech_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each module-technology relationship */,
  "module_id" INTEGER /* ID of the module */,
  "tech_id" INTEGER /* ID of the technology */,
  "is_mandatory" INTEGER /* Whether the technology is mandatory for the module */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the relationship */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("module_tech_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_module_technology_module_id FOREIGN KEY ("module_id") REFERENCES modules ("module_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_module_technology_tech_id FOREIGN KEY ("tech_id") REFERENCES technologies ("tech_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aggregators" (
  "aggregator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aggregator module */,
  "aggregator_name" TEXT /* Name of the aggregator module (e.g., java.se) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the aggregator module */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the aggregator module was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the aggregator module was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aggregator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "module_aggregator" (
  "module_aggregator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each module-aggregator relationship */,
  "module_id" INTEGER /* ID of the module */,
  "aggregator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the aggregator module */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("module_aggregator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_module_aggregator_aggregator_id FOREIGN KEY ("aggregator_id") REFERENCES aggregators ("aggregator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_module_aggregator_module_id FOREIGN KEY ("module_id") REFERENCES modules ("module_id")
)
